name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the .NET Framework 4.5, including core libraries and runtime concepts.

name: .NET MVC (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the ASP.NET MVC framework, including routing, controllers, and views.

name: SQL (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of SQL queries, data manipulation and transaction processing.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the software testing life cycle, testing tools and techniques, design of test cases and generation of test reports.

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Spring core, AOP, IOC container and transactions.

name: Marketing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge of marketing principles, market research, consumer behavior, brand management, sales management, channel management and advertisement management.

name: Human Resources (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures understanding of basic Human Resources concepts like planning, training and development, performance appraisal, and compensation management, plus organizational behavior.

name: Accounts Payable (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of accounts payable processes and procedures.

name: Accounts Payable Simulation (New)
description: Job simulation that measures a candidate's ability to perform realistic accounts payable tasks.

name: Accounts Receivable (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of accounts receivable processes and procedures.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: A development report that consolidates results across ability, personality and competency data into skills development recommendations.
